---
name: Schema Extension Proposal
about: Propose a new field, vertical module, or structural change to the GDR schema
title: "[SCHEMA] "
labels: schema
assignees: mj3b
---

## Change Type

- [ ] New field in core GDR schema
- [ ] New vertical module (domain-specific extension)
- [ ] Modification to existing field
- [ ] Deprecation proposal

## Governance Rationale

**What failure mode does this field or change prevent?**
Every GDR field must justify its existence by naming the governance failure it addresses:

## Proposed Schema Change

Show the JSON Schema addition or modification:

```json

```

## Framework Mapping

Which governance framework requirement does this satisfy? (NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, EU AI Act, ARAF, AIGN OS, other):

## Backward Compatibility

- [ ] Additive only (existing valid GDRs remain valid)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump)

## Reference or Evidence

Link to published research, regulatory guidance, or production implementation supporting this change:

---
*Schema changes require governance rationale. Proposals without a named failure mode will not be merged.*
